description: Launcher-side package for approved special/name-locked portrait handoff before the full client asset catalog is mounted.

source_policy.required_existing_asset_hint: approved cleared special/name-locked portrait asset in main client

notes: This package replaces legacy celebrity-facing wording with publish-safe special/name-lock terminology.
Do not ship real-person likeness mappings unless rights, license, parody, or original-character clearance is documented.
Do not include the full game portrait catalog in the launcher. The launcher needs only the minimal fallback human package and approved cleared special/name-locked portrait package.
